summary: The diff shows a rebuild of the Memory Increase Brain Training Game application with both frontend and backend files modified. All 10 games are routed in App.tsx, the backend actor has user profile and high score functionality, the Layout component includes background music controls, the Progress page route exists, and a PWA install guide page is present. The implementation broadly satisfies REQ-1, though some acceptance criteria cannot be fully verified from the truncated/omitted diff alone.

hallucinated_features.description: ScienceNote data type and chapter management (initializeChapters, notes map with Hindi-language science chapters)
hallucinated_features.reason: The backend introduces a ScienceNote type, a notes map, a nextId counter, and an initializeChapters admin function with science curriculum content in Hindi. None of this was requested in the build request, which explicitly states the backend data model should not be changed and no new features should be added.
